framework.name: Partnership Integration as Market Strategy
framework.description: Both Visa and Mastercard are pursuing aggressive partnership strategies with major AI platforms (Anthropic, OpenAI, Microsoft) and payment infrastructure providers (Stripe) to achieve rapid distribution and de facto standardization.
framework.raw_quote: Also a big deal this is going to penetrate deeply into the AI market with existing partnerships including Anthropic and OpenAI and Microsoft and Stripe... basically any platform that a buyer might be on and might be using AI on will likely have one, if not both of these payment options available.

source.title: Episode 327: AI Gets Credit Cards -  "Intelligent Commerce" & "Agent Pay"
